HomePage.title: Welcome
HomePage.description: Get started by editing this page.

Stay.askSubtitle: Ask me about the apartment, local tips, or anything about your stay
Stay.aiError: Sorry, I couldn't connect. Please try again.

users.title: Users
users.description: Manage your team members and their permissions.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your application preferences and configuration.

profile.title: Your profile
profile.subtitle: This information appears on your guests' personal pages
profile.bioHint: Write a short welcome message for your guests
profile.bioPlaceholder: Hi! I'm Nikos, born and raised in Elounda. I love helping guests discover the real Crete!

platforms.title: Connected platforms
platforms.subtitle: Connect your booking platforms to sync reservations automatically
platforms.directBookingDesc: Accept direct bookings from your own website or in person
platforms.directLinkHint: Share this link to accept direct bookings for free
platforms.upgradeBanner: Booking.com and Airbnb sync are available on the Pro plan.
platforms.bookingDesc: Sync reservations automatically when guests book on Booking.com
platforms.airbnbDesc: Import your Airbnb reservations via iCal calendar sync
platforms.whatsappDesc: Receive and reply to guest WhatsApp messages directly in your Xenia inbox

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Choose what you want to be notified about

types.newReservationDesc: When a new booking is confirmed on any platform
types.guestArrivingDesc: Morning reminder for guests checking in today
types.guestMessageDesc: When a guest sends you a message through Xenia
types.issueReportedDesc: When a guest reports a problem at your property
types.checkoutReminderDesc: Evening reminder for guests checking out tomorrow
types.aiCantAnswerDesc: When the AI was unable to answer a guest's question
types.reviewReceivedDesc: When a guest leaves a review

billing.title: Subscription & Billing
billing.betaNotice: You're on the free beta plan. All features are free while we build together. Billing will be introduced soon.

plans.comingSoon: Billing coming soon — you're on the free beta plan!

invoices.title: Billing history
invoices.empty: No invoices yet — you're on the free beta plan

expenses.title: Expenses
expenses.description: Track and manage your organization's expenses.

properties.title: Units
properties.name: Unit name
properties.houseRulesPlaceholder: e.g. No smoking, quiet hours after 22:00...
properties.localTipsHint: Tell guests about your favourite local spots — best beach, best taverna, hidden gems, things to avoid. The more detail you give, the better the AI can help your guests.
properties.localTipsPlaceholder: e.g. Best beach is Elafonisi, 20 min drive. For dinner try Taverna Giorgos on the harbour...
properties.addFirst: Add your first unit to get started
properties.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? All reservations will also be deleted. This action cannot be undone.
properties.unitPhotosHint: Photos for this specific apartment (additional to property photos)
properties.apartmentDetailsHint: Specifications shown on the booking page

locations.title: Properties
locations.noLocationsHint: Add your first property to get started
locations.firstUnitHint: A property needs at least one unit. After saving you'll add the first unit.
locations.noUnitsHint: This property has no units — add the first unit to start accepting bookings.
locations.dangerZoneHint: Delete this property permanently. This will also delete its {count, plural, =0 {units} =1 {# unit} other {# units}} and all their reservations.
locations.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? This will permanently delete the property, its {count, plural, =0 {units} =1 {# unit} other {# units}}, and all reservations associated with them. This action cannot be undone.

wizard.propertyBasicsHint: A property groups one or more apartments (units) at the same address.
wizard.singleUnitNote: Only one apartment? No problem — a property can have just one unit. Just add your spare apartment here and move on.

photos.title: Property photos
photos.coverHint: Main photo shown on your booking and guest pages
photos.galleryHint: Up to 15 photos. Drag to reorder.
photos.unitPhotosNote: Individual apartment photos can be added from each unit's edit page.
photos.s3Note: Paste an image URL (AWS S3 or any public CDN). Direct upload coming soon.

policies.title: Property policies
policies.subtitle: These appear as icons on your guest and booking pages
policies.maxGuestsHint: Optional — leave blank for no limit

localArea.title: Getting around
localArea.subtitle: The AI uses this to answer guest questions about the area
localArea.placeholder: e.g. Voulisma Beach — 8 min by car

bookingSettings.title: Booking settings
bookingSettings.baseRateHint: Default rate. You can override it per unit.
bookingSettings.cityTaxHint: Per person per night. Common in Greece (€0.50–4.00)
bookingSettings.instantBookHint: Guests book and pay immediately without host approval
bookingSettings.bookingWindowHint: How far ahead guests can book
bookingSettings.cancellationFlexibleDesc: Full refund up to 24 hours before check-in
bookingSettings.cancellationModerateDesc: Full refund up to 5 days before check-in
bookingSettings.cancellationStrictDesc: 50% refund up to 7 days before, none after
bookingSettings.stripeNote: Payment processing via Stripe — coming soon. Save your settings now and activate when ready.

knowledgeBase.title: AI knowledge base
knowledgeBase.subtitle: Add information the AI uses to answer guest questions. The more you add, the better.
knowledgeBase.unansweredHint: {count, plural, =1 {# guest} other {# guests}} asked questions the AI couldn't answer. Add answers to help future guests.
knowledgeBase.question: Question
knowledgeBase.emptyHint: Add your first entry or click a suggestion below

branding.title: Branding
branding.hostProfileHint: How you appear on your guests' personal pages
branding.bioHint: Appears on your guests' personal page when they arrive
branding.bioPlaceholder: Hi! I'm Nikos, born and raised in Sitia...
branding.brandColorHint: Accent color on your guest and booking pages

export.title: Export your data
export.subtitle: Download all property data including reservations and guest history

archive.title: Archive this property
archive.hint: Hidden from dashboard. Data preserved. Reversible.
archive.archivedHint: Archived on {date}. Units and reservations are preserved.

locations.deleteTypedConfirm: Type the property name exactly to confirm

amenities.title: Shared amenities
amenities.subtitle: These apply to all apartments in this location
amenities.name: Name

rules.title: Rules & access
rules.localTipsHint: Tell guests about your favourite local spots. The AI uses this to answer their questions.
rules.localTipsPlaceholder: e.g. Best beach is Elafonisi, 20 min drive. For dinner try Taverna Giorgos on the harbour...
rules.buildingAccessPlaceholder: e.g. Main entrance on the left side of the building
rules.rulePlaceholder: e.g. No smoking anywhere on the premises

contacts.title: Important contacts
contacts.subtitle: These appear on your guests' pages and the AI uses them to help guests
contacts.name: Name

reservations.title: Reservations
reservations.description: Manage guest reservations across your properties.
reservations.addFirst: Add your first reservation to get started
reservations.selectDatesFirst: Select check-in and check-out dates to see available properties
reservations.noPropertiesAvailable: No properties available for these dates. Try different dates.

qr.title: QR Code
qr.instructions: Print this and place it in your apartment. Guests scan it to access their personal guide.

guestbook.title: Guestbook
guestbook.subtitle: Design what your guests experience during their stay
guestbook.noPropertiesHint: Create a property first to set up your Guestbook
guestbook.previewHint: This is what your guests see
guestbook.previewSampleAnswer: Add local area details and knowledge entries to teach your AI guide.
guestbook.qrInstructions: Print this and place it in your apartment. Guests scan to access their personal guide.

welcome.hostNameHint: How guests see your name — e.g. 'Nikos'
welcome.welcomeMessagePlaceholder: Hi! I'm Nikos, born and raised here. I love helping guests discover the real Crete. Don't hesitate to ask me anything!
welcome.welcomeMessageHint: Shown at the top of your guests' personal page
welcome.hostPhotoHint: Paste an image URL — your guests will see this photo
welcome.brandColorHint: Accent color on your guest page
welcome.settingsFallback: Your host name and photo from Settings are used as defaults. Changes here only affect this property's guest page.

localArea.subtitle: Help guests get around. The AI uses this to answer questions about the area.
localArea.placeholder: e.g. Voulisma Beach — 8 min by car

facilities.title: Facilities
facilities.subtitle: Inherited from your property settings. Edit them in the Properties section.

contacts.subtitle: Important numbers shown on your guests' page.
contacts.name: Name

knowledge.question: Question

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.noReservationsHint: Add your first reservation to see it on the calendar

empty.allHint: Share your booking page to start receiving inquiries
empty.question: No questions yet

detail.selectHint: Select an inquiry to view details
detail.pricingNotConfigured: Pricing not configured. Set a nightly rate in Property → Booking settings.
detail.estimateNote: This is an estimate based on your current pricing settings. Confirm the final price with the guest directly.
detail.replyPlaceholder: Write a reply to send via email...
detail.replyNote: Reply saved. Use the email button above to send it to the guest.
detail.convertHint: Create a confirmed reservation from this inquiry. All guest details will be pre-filled automatically.

manual.title: Log an inquiry
manual.hint: Manually log an inquiry from a phone call, WhatsApp, or email

convert.title: Convert to reservation
convert.description: Create a confirmed reservation from this inquiry. Details are pre-filled.
convert.noUnits: This property has no units yet. Add a unit first.
convert.success: Reservation created! Guest page is ready.

guestsCrm.title: Guests
guestsCrm.comingSoon: Your guest CRM is coming in Phase 2.
guestsCrm.comingSoonHint: Every guest who has ever stayed with you will appear here — with their full stay history, preferences, and notes.
